nasb.text: When they found Him on the other side of the sea, they said to Him, “Rabbi, when did You get here?”

esv.text: When they found him on the other side of the sea, they said to him, “Rabbi, when did you come here?”

cnv.text: 他們在對岸找到了耶穌，就問他：“拉比，你幾時到這裡來的？”

ccb.text: 他们在湖对岸找到了耶稣，对祂说：“老师，你什么时候到这里来的？”

csbs.text: 他们在湖的对岸找到了耶稣，就问他：“拉比，你是什么时候到这里来的？”
